title: Almanac for Spyglass Astronomy (Fixed)
description: A modified fork of the original almanac mod for spyglass astronomy made to no longer conflict with the almanac library mod.
body:
A fork of the [almanac mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/almanac-for-spyglass-astronomy) to resolve a conflict it had with the almanac library mod. No other changes were made to it.

Support will likely not continue unless needed as the mod has not been updated in a while.
